questions: static vs dynamic IP er difference ki?
VPN use korle IP change hoy?
amar IP ki public naki private?
gaming er jonno static IP lagbe
answers: Static IP er charge masik 500 taka extra apnar plan er upor. ISP Digital e static IP request korun app ba helpline theke — 24 ghontar moddhe activate hoye jabe!
Apnar current IP dekhte whatismyip.com e jan ba command prompt e 'ipconfig' likhun. ISP Digital normally dynamic IP provide kore, tobe static IP o available ache.

DNS change korte: Network Settings > IPv4 > DNS manually set korun. Popular options: Google DNS (8.8.8.8), Cloudflare (1.1.1.1), ba ISP Digital er own DNS server. Faster browsing er jonno DNS change helpful!
Static IP vs Dynamic IP: Static IP change hoy na — server hosting, CCTV, remote access er jonno dorkar. Dynamic IP automatic change hoy. ISP Digital duita option e provide kore.
Haan, ISP Digital IPv6 support kore! Apnar router e IPv6 enable korte amader helpline e call korun. Future-proof connectivity er jonno IPv6 important.
IP blocked hoye thakle reason hote pare: suspicious activity detect hoye thakle ba kono website apnar IP block kore thakle. ISP Digital er support e contact korun, amra check korbo.

Port forwarding korte router er admin panel e login korun > Advanced > Port Forwarding/Virtual Server e jan. Game server ba CCTV er jonno specific port add korun. Help laghe ISP Digital er technician remote e kore dibe!
CGNAT (Carrier Grade NAT) mane multiple customer ek public IP share kore. Gaming ba server hosting er problem hole ISP Digital theke dedicated public IP nite paren extra charge e.
Gaming er jonno static IP ar port forwarding duitay important. ISP Digital er gaming plan e static IP included thake ar NAT type Open/Type 1 ensure kora hoy. Lag-free gaming experience paben!

IP conflict mane duita device e same IP assign hoyeche. Router restart korun ba device er IP manually set korun different address e. ISP Digital er router e DHCP automatic handle kore, restart e fix hoye jay.
